    49.LoveDryad: There is violence afoot. Until it is resolved, I cannot in good conscience see any customers. Guard yourself, little one.!WYR_Circus_State_PostCombatWYR_Circus_Clown_State_HostileWYR_Circus_HasMet_LoveDryad_PostCombat

    280.LoveDryad: There is a great love amongst you - Zethino senses it. Bring your leader to me, and we shall see if your love is that of ages.!Avatar

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player

    381.LoveDryad: You have already sought Zethino's guidance, little one. Nurture and protect your love - for it is one of life's most precious gifts.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Knows_PlayerTriedGameWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_PassedLoveTestWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_PlayedGame

    439.LoveDryad: Your guise may fool the others, but Zethino knows your heart - you have already sought guidance. Let others have their turn.!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Knows_PlayerTriedGameWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_PlayedGame

    561.LoveDryad: You return, stira - good. Violence is like fire - it burns all those in its path. I feared you caught in the flames.!WYR_Circus_HasMet_LoveDryad_PostCombatWYR_Circus_HasMet_LoveDryadWYR_Circus_State_PostCombatWYR_Circus_Clown_State_HostileWYR_Circus_HasMet_LoveDryad_PostCombat

    180.LoveDryad: Violence erupts here - my home. My refuge in this city of stone and steel. Solace escapes me...!WYR_Circus_HasMet_LoveDryad_PostCombatWYR_Circus_State_PostCombatWYR_Circus_Clown_State_HostileWYR_Circus_HasMet_LoveDryad_PostCombat

    582.LoveDryad: You return, stira. I pray the hearts of you and your companion are ready - for love is a fragile blossom, and we will test its resilience.         478.Player: Why do you keep calling me 'stira'?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d391867e-112c-a8b7-9f60-a7606295b0ecSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8b8e5be6g58ceg4b86gb1bfg5a3fb4e5fbd0Text UUID: fd3c56ee-e611-4a41-bfad-58e211f3062eShow Once: True
        • +
          401.LoveDryad: Forgive me - I had not realised. My beloved, before she died, was a woman of great strength and fortitude. I called her stira in our quiet moments.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b0076fff-87bd-a326-a067-dcb360ba361dSpeaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h77a67cc0geb9ag460aga682g7df39767299aText UUID: 24b1b254-fffe-486e-9b3c-46b1f2bc1313Timeline Phase Index: 35Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b0076fff-87bd-a326-a067-dcb360ba361dTimeline Phase Duration: 21.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: b0076fff-87bd-a326-a067-dcb360ba361dGroup Index: 0
          • •

      391.LoveDryad: Your eyes, stira. There is pain, endless and deep. But also devotion - blazing like the sun. You're in love, are you not?

      Metadata

          176.LoveDryad: You are wise to admit it. When it comes to love, vulnerability is armour. Truth, a sword. And trust, a shield. I pray you wield all three, stira.

                                                                    310.Orin: I could end it now - but I'll be patient. Father will see us together again. He will see you bleed. [End]note: Orin twists her ring and disappears.

                                                                  82.Orin: You let such ruptured creatures swim in your blood wake. One little skull poke and you forget how to drown them.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question2Wrong

                                                                  • •
                                                                    72.Orin: Do not worry, slaughter kin. My blades are still sharp and sweet. They will greet you soon enough. [End]note: Orin twists her ring and disappears.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1b29f344-acf9-71b9-303e-5661edab4e21Speaker: 12 (Orin)Text Handle: hf90e784fg43f1g43fdg8659g9df83ea50d56Text UUID: d630611c-ef70-41f1-b6f4-fa7b76c64a0bTimeline Phase Index: 238Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1b29f344-acf9-71b9-303e-5661edab4e21Timeline Phase Duration: 15.65sTimeline Phase Shots: 2End Node: True

                                                                • +
                                                                  48.Orin: Have you come beg-begging, sniffing for our stones? Gortash won't like that. A throat his black hand can't choke the spit from.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1197063d-ea27-7233-2045-b7d3a7493acdSpeaker: 12 (Orin)Text Handle: h2c8ffc5bg5836g441egbd3age167e351009dText UUID: 6f26cb62-7384-4019-9141-061fed5b877dGroup ID: a391dc6c-2f6f-93b6-a0c2-bde892082b2dGroup Index: 1
                                                                  • +
                                                                    55.Orin: Your bond will not save you. He will wrap its cord around your neck and make you swing from it.!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question2Wrong!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question3Wrong!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question1Wrong

                                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                                    • •
                                                                      363.Orin: When you find the lordling, tell him Orin is watching. [End]note: Orin twists her ring and disappears.

                                                                  236.Orin: Gortash knows you are coming. Knows you have the Bone Lord's stone. Do not let him hiss hot air into your worm-weakened brain.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6b982392-9cbb-f953-89e3-7142d8e63e06Speaker: 12 (Orin)Text Handle: hb39c63adg9c3dg4fa9g880fg5a0cdf7918ddText UUID: a3e3c252-343f-4532-8469-48e6d3286b79Group ID: d41901f6-4e42-e150-1eb1-813692b18bd6Group Index: 1

                                                                      250.Orin: Remember - his throat spits lies, but my blade carves the truth. You will read it on your skin soon enough. [End]note: Orin twists her ring and disappears.

                                                    179.ShadowheartIllusion: I suppose I should be grateful - you helped me shed any illusions that you might have been paying attention. Thank you.

                                                      • +
                                                        71.LoveDryad: A pity. I thought your bond a mighty oak. Instead, it is kindling - a brush of fire shall make it crumble.!FemaleWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Knows_PlayerTriedGameWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_PlayedGame

                                                        • +
                                                          409.LoveDryad: But do not despair, seedlings. You are young - you will find love.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b462a410-4494-66d8-9324-cd0cb0a016b7Speaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: hf418a2ecgc39dg4616gb5fdg2819289f7af8Text UUID: 7e4e2f42-c5dd-49ad-97e6-ceeab92acb72Group ID: 1b094e42-6a5b-dd50-27b6-e1fd0f26a127Group Index: 1
                                                          • •
                                                            244.LoveDryad: It will simply not be with one another. Farewell. [End]

                                                47.Player: Failing her goddess when it counted the most.Enemy of Shar

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 3 ShadowheartIllusion
                                                • Enemy of Shar {8eca8027-996c-4c61-bec6-77f853de295b} = True

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 113f386d-e29d-cc20-4f90-e469d5193e70Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd1251891g1191g45eeg9149gad32907c12bdText UUID: b4d93c23-1f27-4662-b5e4-d2129dd6dca2Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 7bc7bcd5-8723-47ba-a90f-edfc9b1f4e74
                                                • See Node 403 (ShadowheartIllusion) I didn't think a little game would sting so much when I agreed to this... but you're right.
                                          • +
                                            519.LoveDryad: The sweetest loves dance lightly on the tongue. But now we must dig deeper. Into the most painful reaches of the spirit.Female

                                            Flags and Tags

                                            checktype Tag | speaker 12 Orin
                                            • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f} = True

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dffcab63-0c62-e590-307c-80d00ae71e22Speaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: hdbea1fd7g0cecg4c6agbc5dg5e6e9a9acac3Text UUID: 464b8aef-e86a-4c9c-a2cc-79c854c209e6Timeline Phase Index: 114Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dffcab63-0c62-e590-307c-80d00ae71e22Timeline Phase Duration: 12.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: Waterfall third position (f8b32f23-01a8-4e5f-850b-31710e957fe0) @ 1142s
                                            • See Node 441 (LoveDryad) Shame sits in the soul of all - to tame it, we must name it. Shadowheart - what is her deepest shame?
                                    • +

                                            366.LoveDryad: Do not fear - there is time yet. For our touch has been light, but now we must dig deep - deeper than any other.!Female

                                            Flags and Tags

                                            checktype Tag | speaker 12 Orin
                                            • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f} = False

                                            • See Node 441 (LoveDryad) Shame sits in the soul of all - to tame it, we must name it. Shadowheart - what is her deepest shame?
                                          • +
                                            475.LoveDryad: There is a hollowness between you, something brittle and strained. We must dig deeper. Grasp the pain hiding within.Female

                                          • See Node 366 (LoveDryad) Do not fear - there is time yet. For our touch has been light, but now we must dig deep - deeper than any other.

                                                    • +
                                                      387.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I should know not to underestimate you. You see me with clear eyes and open mind. !WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question2Wrong!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question3Wrong!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question1Wrong

                                                    • +
                                                      424.Origin_Intro_Laezel: An illuminating exercise. You've listened, if not always with both ears in attendance.!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question2Wrong!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question3WrongWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question1Wrong

                                                  • +
                                                    261.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I suppose I should be grateful - you helped me shed any illusions that you've been paying attention.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 76291486-7c26-61f1-c161-977c812b8ebfSpeaker: 2 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h63a5a91fgf70fg42aag86f8gd936f4136df7Text UUID: ce08f2b3-9805-419c-8f3b-b9e8eda36393Timeline Phase Index: 197Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 76291486-7c26-61f1-c161-977c812b8ebfTimeline Phase Duration: 6.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                    • •

                                                      Node Type: JumpUUID: e3f6b49c-e46a-107d-cabc-fcfc3999b890Jump Target: Node 179 (4fe76a10-dd12-dc52-3ec2-b9a62b19d962)Jump Target Point: 2
                                                • +
                                                  592.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Quite right. This is my fate, wrought by loyalty, entrusted to Vlaakith.!Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  checktype Tag | speaker 2 Origin_Intro_Laezel
                                                  • Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path. {616688cd-b203-4f14-8c33-086bb83062a3} = False

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fbd93751-ae5d-1138-7aa8-6a4083d549f6Speaker: 2 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h0bb08fa1g9ed5g4ba8g90a7gbbfca02d5576Text UUID: cf454d6e-8cf5-4a3a-b322-83fffd8dc5f3Timeline Phase Index: 85Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fbd93751-ae5d-1138-7aa8-6a4083d549f6Timeline Phase Duration: 6.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                                                  • See Node 350 Jump to Node 331
                                              • +
                                                367.Player: She will be known as a liberator of the githyanki people.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a6ea4f78-61aa-5d18-c2b6-1c0371cc61c7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h51530bf6g402eg41b8ga3a4g310d7639ecfcText UUID: ee00e356-02a8-46c3-b67e-9cb7c37802d7Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  294.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I will carry the truth to my people, whatever it might mean. Only time will tell how I'm remembered.Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  checktype Tag | speaker 2 Origin_Intro_Laezel
                                                  • Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path. {616688cd-b203-4f14-8c33-086bb83062a3} = True

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 861016a8-ad0b-4754-a064-834df8060e92Speaker: 2 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h657fe077gf9a2g47c5g8202g16e9c41c2342Text UUID: 509ecd7e-55c6-4141-b7a9-ec2a4ef2503fTimeline Phase Index: 38Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 861016a8-ad0b-4754-a064-834df8060e92Timeline Phase Duration: 7.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                                                  • See Node 350 Jump to Node 331
                                                • +
                                                  344.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Bah - my people already know liberty. Once, the illithids enslaved us; thanks to Vlaakith, we remain free.!Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  checktype Tag | speaker 2 Origin_Intro_Laezel
                                                  • Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path. {616688cd-b203-4f14-8c33-086bb83062a3} = False

                                                  • See Node 350 Jump to Node 331
                                              • +
                                                167.Player: A vicious monster of legend, feared across the planes.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4aa532d4-668f-5781-251e-23140c8da7a1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5decb16cg0b2fg4d76g8f8agb1188c0eb269Text UUID: 9c4594cd-23f8-48f1-a0ee-cf566361ec98Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  128.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I will be feared, this much is true. As a monster? No. As a champion? Most certainly.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 35b882c6-0626-7f7b-f172-da9124e7e2eeSpeaker: 2 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8695a9fcg6178g4badg82adg68a6d26aeefdText UUID: d812c261-9c6f-49ee-8f07-bc13cbd8a0a5Timeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 35b882c6-0626-7f7b-f172-da9124e7e2eeTimeline Phase Duration: 9.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                                                  • See Node 350 Jump to Node 331
                                              • +
                                                9.Player: She will take Vlaakith's place as Queen of the githyanki.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 023ed5d0-06f7-8574-e03d-b3d61d79359fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h32f22294g3a14g47f4g81e8g8cdc6289ade4Text UUID: 0a4e0717-d1e0-40eb-a3e8-a27380c73a98Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  187.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You confuse fiction for fact. Even at my most loyal, I never longed for the githyanki throne.Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  checktype Tag | speaker 2 Origin_Intro_Laezel

                                                  • See Node 350 Jump to Node 331
                                                • +
                                                  545.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Vlaakith is the githyanki. I would never deign take the place of my Queen!!Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                        172.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Mm. I took my pleasure, and it was done. I've devoted few thoughts to it since.!ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezelWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                      • +
                                        572.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A fateful night. I'm not apt to forget it - or who spent it with me.ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel

                                      515.Player: Tearing the limbs from the beasts of the Sea of Night.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: deab191a-870b-468e-71fd-11367e74b4f5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h16f384c1gccf0g4db2gb6fcg53326fdd5d04Text UUID: ff4c1a90-16e7-4c90-82b6-76b8802d51a6Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 0bfb9b55-0175-4ca2-ac95-c9fb2f5f4587
                                      • +
                                        100.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Well observed. There is no fouler scent - and no sweeter - than that of a neogi's blood.

                                      263.Player: Spilling her own cousins' blood.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 76dabac5-c3ba-3806-d680-305014a870b5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h20ddeb2egf21bg4521g849dge1a7178a2895Text UUID: a4f4404f-bb60-4e15-86ab-4bcf0bb0b257Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 6a91ec03-a12e-4bcd-bea8-46b7c6a43ad0
                                      • +
                                        375.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A small delight, indeed. I did not want their friendship - I wanted their fear.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aa38f9b7-26a0-677e-4153-dff936b22a14Speaker: 2 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h5e9fd788gdfaag47ffg8c8agea48350c98baText UUID: 2d03627d-4cc4-4cd0-a813-723762a965bfTimeline Phase Index: 31Timeline Dialog Node UUID: aa38f9b7-26a0-677e-4153-dff936b22a14Timeline Phase Duration: 7.39sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID

                                  547.No Speaker: Alias to Node 103Female

                                  Node Type: AliasUUID: eabf4e86-5cb3-8683-d695-cb44593d8c42Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)
                                  • See Node 103 (LoveDryad) Many things delight the heart, but only one makes it sing. Tell me, what is the githyanki's fondest memory?
                            • +
                              188.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I would not be ascended - not by my own will, and not by Vlaakith's. Are you truly so indifferent to me?Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                          • +
                            283.Player: To find the truth about Orpheus amidst her queen's lies.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8213df6c-16ac-9db8-224d-b2719805bd08Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he35e295egf54dg4e8dg92d2g3117240530d9Text UUID: f3694592-1cd4-4ddb-9111-c3d50fb831e8Show Once: True
                            • +
                              251.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You hear my words, you see my path. It is good to be known.Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.

                              Flags and Tags

                              checktype Tag | speaker 2 Origin_Intro_Laezel

                                                        235.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You really know me, don't you? It's wild. In so many ways, we barely know each other.                           85.LoveDryad: The heart is fraught, so let us begin with the joyous. When is he happiest?

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1f3828fc-1f06-80dd-d123-d3fa55552ab7Speaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h62177b2cgfe91g444bg8d72g7bdf0ba89cb5Text UUID: 38201998-5dc9-439b-8c13-d0aaf74e3d6dGroup ID: 92385309-902e-abd2-7959-c8707175c5faGroup Index: 1
                          • +
                            301.Player: I don't think he's ever been happy.

                            Metadata

                            • +
                              160.Astarion: Excuse me? I've been happy, thank you very much.

                                                • +
                                                  333.Player: Forever feeling like a slave to someone else.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 99f54793-f072-3b73-1141-eb4c708f61c8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: had2ea0cag5ec7g4b89ga9edg6ef78553140eText UUID: 3d07e5fc-6bee-4141-9382-dab4e914a4b1Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 64d61b35-ea20-4f19-9dc7-6da2c6b4722d
                                                  • +
                                                    136.Astarion: Really? I mean, yes, but - really? You'd tell whatever stranger just walked up and asked?

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 39a1e767-1b16-ca80-3bc2-2270bb1ae29fSpeaker: 6 (Astarion)Text Handle: h40ddc938g4adag4028g95f8gb6bf6958b3ecText UUID: 377972e7-8ae2-40b1-b978-6976c41e9c06Timeline Phase Index: 139Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 39a1e767-1b16-ca80-3bc2-2270bb1ae29fTimeline Phase Duration: 7.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      69.LoveDryad: That which needs to be said is often the most difficult. Take pride - you are one step closer to conquering your fears.!Female

                                                      Flags and Tags

                                                      checktype Tag | speaker 12 Orin
                                                      • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f} = False

                                                    • +

                                                    • +
                                                      281.LoveDryad: I cannot, little one. I can accept truth, and only truth - and you know that is not what lies within your hearts.!Female

                                                      • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f} = False

                                                    • +
                                                      12.LoveDryad: You betray yourselves. A bond based on lies will one day be severed.Female

                                                  24.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Her face still haunts me. If I could make the sun rise in the west, reverse the Chionthar's waters, I'd spare her my folly.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 072eedf1-d73e-423a-63ea-cc6c6c755b71Speaker: 7 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h62fb4fb7gae37g4531g8116g65f08bf8303dText UUID: 37718d07-1483-4f2f-9783-3a0045345b0bTimeline Phase Index: 154Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 072eedf1-d73e-423a-63ea-cc6c6c755b71Timeline Phase Duration: 10.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 25d96582-3015-b9d2-5c57-e43e9277edd0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h0a362800gc7fdg4522g800ege160347a154fText 1 UUID: 0fcdea25-5a52-4188-bfbe-54cff74982dcText 2 Handle: h8ea4e6a4g0cadg4beegb12eg48b4aa5f936fText 2 UUID: ab7c3c5b-bd9c-4b56-89da-99563a8ab504Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: fba7bc8a-f5cb-45a4-b280-0a432369530d
                                                • +
                                                  532.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Never. That you live, that you walk this path, is a delight worth celebrating, not lamenting.KarlachWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  ruletagtype rule

                                                  • Karlach
                                                  Never. That you live, that you walk this path, is a delight worth celebrating, not lamenting.

                                                156.Player: Making a pact with Mizora.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 47c59e98-b344-89a1-6999-04ccdc9480c7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h42bf8606g169ag4fabgb63dg75427a260431Text UUID: c0f56239-7e7a-4e11-ae97-731b486f2c0fShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 5e9eb7a4-526f-4ffd-a092-3d2566cc477a
                                                • +
                                                  432.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The Hells threatened to swallow the city. I made the only choice I could.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                                  • WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong {48899fa7-dc51-6e3b-db88-bf0a150921a5} = True

                                                541.Player: Losing his father.GLO_Ravengard_State_Defeated

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Global
                                                • GLO_Ravengard_State_Defeated {7bb624ef-09cb-4e55-b035-832c05427a61} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e91a701f-810b-3342-b537-bb1130d8d38aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7426243ag2239g480bga610gbcc1bf049f37Text UUID: a635e925-d7f7-4a28-8d1d-7b3ad4b914a6Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 3b1fbd50-ec67-446e-891e-a59d4c6c35ed
                                                • +
                                                  175.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Truly spoken. All he'd done for Baldur's Gate, for its people... He earned a better fate than the one Gortash gave him.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4e8dd364-39d6-c9c2-bda0-c71e2d92ac8eSpeaker: 7 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hfc191fc7g57ffg42f8g97dfg8cb9f2fadde1Text UUID: d962dcc6-353c-49e8-bddb-6106d2faa82dTimeline Phase Index: 208Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4e8dd364-39d6-c9c2-bda0-c71e2d92ac8eTimeline Phase Duration: 10.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • See Node 168 Jump to Node 24
                                              • +
                                                377.Player: Leaving behind his father - and his city.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: aa91f308-85f2-60e8-a666-e1d236aaefd3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h82947778gd5f0g4f10g976cg6b373de0513fText UUID: ccbb826b-eaf9-42b0-b7fd-1640c8055373Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 3b1fbd50-ec67-446e-891e-a59d4c6c35ed
                                                • +
                                                  7.Origin_Intro_Wyll: He gave me no choice. But it's true. I often wonder - what if I'd said the right words, made the right promises?

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 017eb017-0d5d-30f6-60ae-7cd380529667Speaker: 7 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h01b93c69g5fdcg4b6fg97d5g2c277ed49091Text UUID: eace9619-0a87-4771-a077-094a63698317Timeline Phase Index: 148Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 017eb017-0d5d-30f6-60ae-7cd380529667Timeline Phase Duration: 21.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 017eb017-0d5d-30f6-60ae-7cd380529667Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    412.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Maybe I'd have been with him on the journey from Elturel. Maybe there'd be no Absolute, no infections, no... this.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b598f9d7-09df-2384-0028-2ea49a1bd7f2Speaker: 7 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd546c8c7gd7dcg4ca7gabb6gad9d1102b3d0Text UUID: 805a695f-9085-4d8d-a955-7f04f6e88fa9Group ID: 017eb017-0d5d-30f6-60ae-7cd380529667Group Index: 1
                                                    • See Node 168 Jump to Node 24
                                              • +
                                                577.Player: Joining up with me.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f528370f-23f3-9596-257a-18c91299daf2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h744405bag2464g4e0dgb4c4g8ed894712d58Text UUID: 6b559067-46f2-4f5f-9c69-d8c12c13eb14Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 5e9eb7a4-526f-4ffd-a092-3d2566cc477a
                                                • +
                                                  399.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It pains me to hear you say it. We shared a bond, or so I thought. Does it mean nothing to you?WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                                  • WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong {48899fa7-dc51-6e3b-db88-bf0a150921a5} = True

                                      • +
                                        287.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Hardly. Astonishing that you'd even utter her name.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        settype Object | speaker 1 Player

                                      247.Player: His father, Ulder Ravengard.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 713e86e7-8a7c-2735-0945-2fb92b186ea7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h48bc048dgf076g4b20gb090g258b34308ea2Text UUID: 01768e05-94a4-4386-8039-d05bd1f2cfb2Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 412ed7cf-340b-4f8d-9002-f19aaa0f1a06
                                      • +
                                        459.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Indeed. We've not always seen eye to eye, but his every thought, every act, was in service to his people. Among men, there is none greater.!GLO_Ravengard_State_Defeated

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        334.Origin_Intro_Wyll: May he be at peace. We did not see eye to eye, but his every thought, every act, was in service to his people. Among men, there was none greater.GLO_Ravengard_State_Defeated

                                        Flags and Tags

                                      320.Player: Balduran, the great hero of Baldur's Gate.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 93a44873-58a7-0543-c5a0-13bccbae4a2cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0ddaaf1dge181g42feg910fgcf4a3e22e58aText UUID: 020de6c6-17fb-4bbb-b5e6-37cf7b544a6aShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: c7225023-48ac-47d9-8c31-4a015967c938
                                      • +
                                        141.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Yes - a hero in all senses. A courageous explorer and a just spirit. A pity to see what's become of him.WYR_AnsurGhost_Event_HeartOfTheGate

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Global
                                        • WYR_AnsurGhost_Event_HeartOfTheGate {e8f24879-b7a8-19cd-3e23-f5ae391b1c4e} = True

                                        • +

                                          • See Node 91 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 417
                                      • +
                                        407.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Yes - a hero in all senses. A courageous explorer and a just spirit. Would that we all aspired to his greatness.

                                        Metadata

                              317.Origin_Intro_Wyll: A mug of nutty darndarr and a plate of cured meats? It's no Mount Celestia - but it's close.

                            • +
                              113.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You'd have been right, not so long ago. But things have changed - a different time, a different Blade.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                              527.LoveDryad: We often gaze through a veil of roses, but love accepts both the petal and the thorn. Gale - what is his greatest flaw?

                            486.Player: A shiny red apple - wholesome as can be.

                              152.Gale: Ah, the fruit of scholars. How I long to have a troop of loyal students grace me with apples by the orchard-full in exchange for wisdoms imparted...

                368.Gale: Perhaps you're overestimating my affection towards you a tad? You'd better seek a partner-in-embarrassment elsewhere. [End]Approval_AtLeast_0_For_Sp2

                214.Minthara: I know my heart - and yours - better than this creature ever will. But we can indulge it if you wish.ORI_State_PartneredWithMintharaGEN_TransferNPCPaymentWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_PickedCompanion

                        465.LoveDryad: Minthara: a mask of ice hides a heart of pure fire - you do well to call her close.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d0297885-0faf-d396-6ea7-2f2fa86d62afSpeaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h97f0b787g70d6g4c2bg846ag5cdd7669a452Text UUID: 791be224-8620-4ad8-abd4-2e46060b1137Timeline Phase Index: 62Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d0297885-0faf-d396-6ea7-2f2fa86d62afTimeline Phase Duration: 24.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: 1st_DruidAnswers_Staging (51832990-5f2d-4058-9a02-34b7df4134be) @ 643.87s; Waterfall start part 2 (6dcf9105-ee0d-4adb-8473-4965846710f1) @ 664.37sGroup ID: d0297885-0faf-d396-6ea7-2f2fa86d62afGroup Index: 0
                        • +
                          3.LoveDryad: Listen. Think. What does the drow miss most about the Underdark?

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 00989c9c-4007-3ec7-699d-89dd92bb63adSpeaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: hb9eea705g761ag438fg9ec6g23a9e2a8d1c5Text UUID: 763564e0-df02-4c56-af0f-b3ad7947fcf7Group ID: d0297885-0faf-d396-6ea7-2f2fa86d62afGroup Index: 1
                          • +
                            170.Player: Picking off her siblings one by one.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4b31ce4f-b598-3bcf-e40b-00e44d807ce3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc9e23391g1767g4093g828cg5f2d2db0181eText UUID: a398deed-0ef5-4343-bfae-228487f0ede0Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 8a51a81a-9068-4c6e-a9e3-92666c139e62
                            • +
                              210.Minthara: Not just siblings. Androcide, senicide, avunculicide - I only regret I left before enjoying a matricide. That would be a memory to cherish.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                              Flags and Tags

                              settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                              • WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong {48899fa7-dc51-6e3b-db88-bf0a150921a5} = True

                              Metadata

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f} = False

                                  • +
                                    132.LoveDryad: Many pass through our lives, their touch rippling across time. But who does Minthara admire the most?

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 39023617-8bc2-066d-ea97-f4a624dbf986Speaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: hd8a95bb2gb68eg4dfega675g5ab84458635fText UUID: dc8f7d31-4b40-4bd9-bd48-5bd218efe742Timeline Phase Index: 137Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 39023617-8bc2-066d-ea97-f4a624dbf986Timeline Phase Duration: 13.52sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: 2nd_DruidAnswers_Staging (7d23cfe2-b15d-41fe-aed5-a5e4098fd1af) @ 1380.99s; Waterfall second position (79dc3d0a-158a-49dd-94bc-c5ec7fc4056e) @ 1390.07s
                                    • +
                                      419.Player: Legendary drow hero Drizzt Do'Urden.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b98c53cc-85a8-02aa-c840-0d8a6393b209Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h63dfbd77ge5eeg4b27g8753g30eda638178eText UUID: 11ff9c7d-53dc-4c64-8065-16c613d95a5aShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 38b1eddd-d577-4ece-8e89-9a988f78615d
                                      • +
                                        421.Minthara: Please. I'd rather spend my nights with a drider than with that do-gooder and his pussycat.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b9ecfa9b-4ccd-774b-9fd6-3e10e61ade38Speaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha04b6c31ga67bg4941ga3dfg8c8e00898deaText UUID: b33afdac-9fb2-49cc-8f82-30e1ab1d9463Timeline Phase Index: 28Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b9ecfa9b-4ccd-774b-9fd6-3e10e61ade38Timeline Phase Duration: 7.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                    • +
                                      97.Player: Nobody.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 269f5c9a-62f9-0444-3929-b4bd3c8b8340Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb4e22c0cgdd07g459bgabfcg0786fb07fb85Text UUID: d0976fe5-f2cd-4904-ab76-722f26e8ba31Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 918dc371-8e17-49a3-9980-379df09b9691
                                      • +
                                        551.Minthara: If I admired nobody I would travel alone. You have earned my admiration. And more.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eb9c962a-c5a6-9e2e-91a9-958a60080b84Speaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: h0635790dg012ag44degab05ga2034171c279Text UUID: f675ab0b-28b9-4b10-b5d2-66e076cd0ebdTimeline Phase Index: 69Timeline Dialog Node UUID: eb9c962a-c5a6-9e2e-91a9-958a60080b84Timeline Phase Duration: 8.98sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                              537.LoveDryad: Those with an icy façade hide their true selves well - but pain breaks us all in the end. What is the worst thing your love has ever done?

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e65c44cb-5108-dfac-f77e-95f8b2272d24Speaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h9618c5fegf6c8g4161g9bfdga9f1e16ab39dText UUID: 52b871d3-81d1-45a4-b40f-80e2cd720645Timeline Phase Index: 64Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e65c44cb-5108-dfac-f77e-95f8b2272d24Timeline Phase Duration: 18.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: 3rd_DruidAnswers_Staging (f4dc0f05-b976-4c53-a60b-f959516cff80) @ 673.15s; Waterfall third position (f8b32f23-01a8-4e5f-850b-31710e957fe0) @ 688.28s
                                              • +
                                                446.Player: Slaughtering the tieflings at the grove.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c69a3965-fe13-435b-1dbc-5e73e97b19dcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h114bb78bgb204g452dgb43cga5a5a9c9f5d9Text UUID: 430bc8ec-f1f5-4da1-95e9-2dab40436b09Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: a1e36a8b-056b-4f69-bd4a-a35c6a30fd5a
                                                • +
                                                  145.Minthara: I barely remember the grove... I was not myself. But my only regret is that I exerted myself in the name of a false god.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                                  • WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong {48899fa7-dc51-6e3b-db88-bf0a150921a5} = True

                                              • +
                                                382.Player: Let herself be captured by the cult of the Absolute.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ab4c90ca-4a63-686c-85d2-f37ee7e25fcaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h326f0b75g593bg4bf8gb893gd8f57ae84672Text UUID: b80f7fdf-8d58-4ada-8354-660ae1678d14Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: de180916-fd26-46ba-b5ba-a8a0fc705427
                                                • +
                                                  84.Minthara: I do not know what weakness of mine allowed them to take me.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1f038953-4fee-48f1-c9d9-1db3c5d7ab10Speaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: h22450661g761bg4f6fg8137gf3ef323670b2Text UUID: 33d3625e-9093-4bde-a455-e1c9c7ef64e9Timeline Phase Index: 152Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1f038953-4fee-48f1-c9d9-1db3c5d7ab10Timeline Phase Duration: 8.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 1f038953-4fee-48f1-c9d9-1db3c5d7ab10Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    19.Minthara: That haunts me more than anything they did to me.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0617e41a-a769-5ebc-2182-56f995f87c5dSpeaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: h59f6b2b3g177dg4073gb1fag3dfdf0aa737fText UUID: bc682bef-3bd9-4564-b4bd-3dd2a04da7c9Group ID: 1f038953-4fee-48f1-c9d9-1db3c5d7ab10Group Index: 1
                                                    • +

                                                      • +
                                                        122.Minthara: You know my heart, and I am glad. You are the first.!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question2Wrong!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question3Wrong!WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_Question1Wrong

                                                    • +
                                                      270.Minthara: I had always kept my heart hidden, but I allowed you to see it. To see me. It saddens me that you saw a stranger instead.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7c4ceccd-00a9-3a84-58ed-e016f7255edfSpeaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: hedb0d73ag9255g42f9gbb1ag1973259880b4Text UUID: 367298e9-d6be-489c-8f14-cdfeaea314f8Timeline Phase Index: 204Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7c4ceccd-00a9-3a84-58ed-e016f7255edfTimeline Phase Duration: 11.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                                              • +
                                                585.Player: Turn her back on Lolth.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f8c403b6-8ef3-d35b-51df-bd2a93186e34Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf9481e44gef9dg4845g88bdg48cdb41b3450Text UUID: 0586dd44-047b-48de-9fd3-5fd380d67e4dShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: a1e36a8b-056b-4f69-bd4a-a35c6a30fd5a
                                                • +
                                                  490.Minthara: Without Lolth or the Absolute, I am free for the first time. Some may call it exile, I call it independence.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                                  • WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong {48899fa7-dc51-6e3b-db88-bf0a150921a5} = True

                                              • +
                                                147.Player: Fall for me.

                                                • +
                                                  395.Minthara: Self-deprecation is not endearing. It is demeaning.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                      330.Player: Me.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 98c47f5d-e2e6-6a27-0578-469a2aaba521Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2271a9e1g35bdg4f33gbb30g15f85993aebaText UUID: fb6324e5-b128-405a-b214-f28681db51b0Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 0b7339ae-e532-415b-aadc-5bc9434d8920
                                      • +
                                        221.Minthara: Presumptious. But not inaccurate. You have earned my companionship - that is no easy task.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 63af017d-4fb9-3754-3d7a-2e856ebcdc1eSpeaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: h6e91ed65g0fccg4931g8539g4b5b50b81d05Text UUID: bddfe10e-3f0f-4457-a30e-3c84d1f6f861Timeline Phase Index: 185Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 63af017d-4fb9-3754-3d7a-2e856ebcdc1eTimeline Phase Duration: 9.69sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                    • +
                                      402.Player: The gods.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b071bcca-6968-352f-5abe-56ea2a722021Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h447dbde3g8b7bg40f9g957egea0bd03141f7Text UUID: 9239114f-c729-42f1-9064-8d76b16b4ffcShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: a648a430-4d9c-4ff1-b77d-80c16288d8ca
                                      • +
                                        430.Minthara: I think not. The gods are more fickle than the fools who follow them.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: be0319f4-f14b-d114-37af-3a155009971eSpeaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: h3695621fg5daag4ed3g9a6fgd47afa729233Text UUID: 3d15cecb-5d69-4e20-9c62-c30c5cded61bTimeline Phase Index: 61Timeline Dialog Node UUID: be0319f4-f14b-d114-37af-3a155009971eTimeline Phase Duration: 5.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                          • +
                            457.Player: Her pet spiders.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cd462c61-2fa6-b402-e7d0-0573867ddc64Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd9daec17gc4ebg4c25g9e5cg4fb8f2462008Text UUID: 20fffd19-c3e4-4e03-90b2-9e7b085728bfShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 22d6435f-e2c7-4194-8b97-0bf5cedc016b
                            • +
                              189.Minthara: Spiders are Lolth's creatures - as was I. Her cult controlled me just as the Absolute did. Not a pleasant memory at all.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5343e1d2-a66d-d27a-54bc-97d5f66cb301Speaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: h4b0f238dg73b9g4d33ga405g03105820fd4cText UUID: 231902f4-3930-44b5-8dc2-0a9b663f9c85Timeline Phase Index: 218Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5343e1d2-a66d-d27a-54bc-97d5f66cb301Timeline Phase Duration: 11.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                            290.Player: Spending time with her beloved family.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 841bce5f-7014-3927-b042-854439414f97Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h290c926dgb17dg41cdg8b0cgb42963605a8aText UUID: feae79e7-5ffe-4c29-b2e1-0aab6888d64cShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 22d6435f-e2c7-4194-8b97-0bf5cedc016b
                            • +
                              178.Minthara: There was no love to be found. My mother would have poisoned her own milk to torment me.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4f638a4c-7488-edc0-41da-9a27e1e42cccSpeaker: 11 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7411a504gf0a7g4539gafb8g1f83f85a071cText UUID: 3a4ac98d-68ba-46a6-88c7-840feeb0c28cTimeline Phase Index: 210Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4f638a4c-7488-edc0-41da-9a27e1e42cccTimeline Phase Duration: 6.95sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                165.Minthara: Fine. But if this creature can truly look into my heart, it best be careful what it reveals.Approval_AtLeast_50_For_Sp2GEN_TransferNPCPaymentWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_PickedCompanion

                86.Minthara: The creature need not look into our hearts to see that I barely tolerate your existence. [End]Approval_AtLeast_0_For_Sp2

                checktype Object | speaker 1 Player

                583.Minthara: No. And if you refer to me as 'my dear' again, I will cut out your tongue. [End]

                Metadata

                                    316.LoveDryad: We strive to do our utmost - to prove ourselves worthy. Tell me - of what is Halsin most proud?

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 924f8ac4-fd1e-f8b6-6ba2-e5f717336f52Speaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h9ba59937gec86g4df9gacabgce11d57618bfText UUID: f04d956a-b50e-4740-95f2-d6265f03757eTimeline Phase Index: 44Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 924f8ac4-fd1e-f8b6-6ba2-e5f717336f52Timeline Phase Duration: 12.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: 2nd_DruidAnswers_Staging (7d23cfe2-b15d-41fe-aed5-a5e4098fd1af) @ 483.98s; Waterfall second position (79dc3d0a-158a-49dd-94bc-c5ec7fc4056e) @ 493.41s
                                    • +
                                      67.Player: His physique. Who can blame him?

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1a7163c8-762b-019a-34ff-3c31ada401daSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbad53ee6g5d78g4d77g970cg6a3cdac74731Text UUID: 67fdc6c6-f51f-46f2-b3f2-ac89d7ec8c2bShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 79baa1d8-8318-4ef0-986a-14d8b013e199
                                      • +
                                        269.Halsin: No, that is not right. My body is but a vessel to serve nature with. To take pride in it is to indulge in vanity.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        settype Object | speaker 1 Player

                                              480.LoveDryad: Life is full of victory and loss. You cannot have one without the other. Halsin - what is his greatest failure?

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d40cdc34-ed14-9ef5-aca4-83e4a9d9f38bSpeaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h20342ce0g6864g4382g9c3eg3fb0b86e82c9Text UUID: bb13fa22-d6da-4a56-a530-98f785269671Timeline Phase Index: 116Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d40cdc34-ed14-9ef5-aca4-83e4a9d9f38bTimeline Phase Duration: 18.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Location Changes: 3rd_DruidAnswers_Staging (f4dc0f05-b976-4c53-a60b-f959516cff80) @ 1160.88s; Waterfall third position (f8b32f23-01a8-4e5f-850b-31710e957fe0) @ 1172.49s
                                              • +
                                                101.Player: Appointing a fanatic as his second-in-command at the grove.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2aab238b-636c-dda6-6439-eec4f26ddee8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf85d2b85gb91bg4aa9gbfa9g6cfa2f268866Text UUID: d64f2d45-76e8-4d50-ab08-b7096eccfc31Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: febf1c66-ed1b-4cdb-9485-32ff7a25cc2b
                                                • +
                                                  8.Halsin: Perhaps not my greatest failure, but a sizeable one, yes. My faith in Kagha showed... poor judgement, put mildly. Very mildly.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 022a0e74-aaa9-fdf0-c9c7-12c7cb4e514fSpeaker: 10 (Halsin)Text Handle: hae736673g0ec2g4830g828fgfe65b355347eText UUID: 577b383a-d5b0-4798-8f64-f25843eae77dTimeline Phase Index: 149Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 022a0e74-aaa9-fdf0-c9c7-12c7cb4e514fTimeline Phase Duration: 12.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • •
                                                    509.Jump to Node 142

                                              • +
                                                228.Player: Allowing the shadow curse to blight nature for a hundred years.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 666b472c-ae6f-fbac-e2c2-bbc6bf487dd6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h46752909g0a1eg4ebcg87a5gb161ad32df83Text UUID: a9ac6d6b-f4a2-466a-a3ea-f183a6998c56Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 0a8622a4-409d-449d-84e0-a0b6ef8d2440
                                                • +
                                                  15.Halsin: It is true. Nature suffered, while I dawdled, and allowed myself to be distracted.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0456990e-d240-f7de-8e44-473e7e8e085dSpeaker: 10 (Halsin)Text Handle: h11ba4ddfg1b7cg46fcg8064g3da60bd6e874Text UUID: 651042fd-0f59-4184-940c-78f99cd4c93aTimeline Phase Index: 151Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0456990e-d240-f7de-8e44-473e7e8e085dTimeline Phase Duration: 25.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 0456990e-d240-f7de-8e44-473e7e8e085dGroup Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    522.Halsin: The curse is no more, true. But imagine if I had been faster, bolder, better. Lives would have been saved. More than I care to count.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e06034cd-6e3b-b596-cfce-b955956532e5Speaker: 10 (Halsin)Text Handle: h16dceb5ag20dfg4818gb588g39fdd98e91c3Text UUID: d20f9e04-2fad-4813-ac65-b20c41dde880Group ID: 0456990e-d240-f7de-8e44-473e7e8e085dGroup Index: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      142.Halsin: But I must move on. Nature demands that I do.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3cf4ecb5-4f03-2fc4-69d1-0c2f31dfe596Speaker: 10 (Halsin)Text Handle: ha685c73agc36eg4f86g8176ga61e18875b51Text UUID: 8d2363cd-3296-43b6-9df6-406cce7526c1Group ID: 0456990e-d240-f7de-8e44-473e7e8e085dGroup Index: 2
                                                      • +

                                                34.Player: That he somehow let some scrawny goblins capture him.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0b441dac-74c0-9dfe-e613-80ce3932b6cbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc067a716gaf3eg4577gb20ag34e95d5d0449Text UUID: c84095b9-007f-46be-b7ac-831e8af9217cShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: fbf45f39-80e5-424b-95bc-a38aa1fc7e4b
                                                • +
                                                  524.Halsin: No... that wasn't my most glorious moment, but my greatest failure? Far from it.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                                  • WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong {48899fa7-dc51-6e3b-db88-bf0a150921a5} = True

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e09bf085-5f40-1245-25d5-6c67217f6bd4Speaker: 10 (Halsin)Text Handle: hee0dc79age921g4d63g85e7g1d9d64ee2e5bText UUID: 7dc119fe-3928-4435-990d-063abad861dbTimeline Phase Index: 115Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e09bf085-5f40-1245-25d5-6c67217f6bd4Timeline Phase Duration: 6.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • •

                                              • +
                                                224.Player: Spurning an amorous she-bear's affections.Halsin_InParty_Event_PlayerLearnedOfSheBear

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Halsin_InParty_Event_PlayerLearnedOfSheBear {b3fea015-bb33-e14e-ec44-67eb6292256e} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 64e82386-60bd-b5f1-a4a6-aca2591f4b06Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9069c577g2d47g45cbg851bg64e59c98ab49Text UUID: cdea23b9-1b9f-446c-be12-65991b4a5cceShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 49d237ba-9ae2-4a69-8724-3344963c428f
                                                • +
                                                  125.Halsin: No, you are mistaken. Rejecting unwanted advances is no failure, even if it earned me some scars.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                                  • WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_LoveQuestionWrong {48899fa7-dc51-6e3b-db88-bf0a150921a5} = True

                                      357.Player: Protecting his grove from those who threatened it.

                                      Metadata

                                      • +
                                        599.Halsin: A source of pride, true. I can think of greater feats, but that one is cherished all the same.

                                        Metadata

                            543.Player: After a supper large enough to induce hibernation.

                            Metadata

                            37.Player: Comfort doesn't come naturally to him - he's restless and roaming.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0ca854eb-14eb-8397-7343-f2166fe10292Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb9942cafgcf84g4c7cga027g4ac97ecd17adText UUID: 1358eb46-6f7c-4a1d-a347-64210930ae56Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: d5235ba1-d1ed-49b4-9815-63c850f2fdcb
                            • +
                              273.Halsin: This is the truth - I live for the wilderness. Comfort is for the farm animal, snug in its pen.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7de361dc-680b-cf84-c167-5706d33f1f91Speaker: 10 (Halsin)Text Handle: hebf54e7cgb246g4e71gbf5cg0272c8fe692aText UUID: 8b52deae-a9c0-4abd-a587-ef64c2847a18Timeline Phase Index: 138Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7de361dc-680b-cf84-c167-5706d33f1f91Timeline Phase Duration: 8.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                          • +

                32.Halsin: I thought you may have bestowed the honour on someone else. But if this is what you wish, so be it.ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondaryGEN_TransferNPCPaymentWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_PickedCompanion

                203.Halsin: I suppose we've braved greater dangers together than public embarrassment. Do as you wish.Approval_AtLeast_50_For_Sp2GEN_TransferNPCPaymentWYR_Circus_LoveDryad_Event_PickedCompanion

              • •
                573.Halsin: You flatter me... but also overestimate our bond, I think. Perhaps there is another you can turn to. [End]Approval_AtLeast_0_For_Sp2

                Flags and Tags

                checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                • Approval_AtLeast_0_For_Sp2 {c90a1ed4-c142-3300-65d0-0a0a4d6e08f7} = True

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f2de91f4-283b-1f27-dea3-c9b2ae5d4051Speaker: 10 (Halsin)Text Handle: h47bdc8c5g1663g46dfg97d0ge4a68b68e44bText UUID: 0cdda76a-ef52-4c82-b95b-3b5161bbf6c8Timeline Phase Index: 224Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f2de91f4-283b-1f27-dea3-c9b2ae5d4051Timeline Phase Duration: 8.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
              • •
                525.Halsin: Nature is my true love. You, I merely tolerate. [End]

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e19f47f1-bf4e-c79b-03f2-9eb1d3f95bc8Speaker: 10 (Halsin)Text Handle: hd0ad76f5g3256g4a37ga2ffgcfd18b4e3b4dText UUID: 872711b7-4b49-4db8-bbd2-91cccfd551c3Timeline Phase Index: 228Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e19f47f1-bf4e-c79b-03f2-9eb1d3f95bc8Timeline Phase Duration: 4.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
            • +
              297.Player: I have someone in mind - let me go get them.WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_ReturningWithCompanion

              Flags and Tags

              settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
              • WYR_Circus_LoveDryad_State_ReturningWithCompanion {97f06c90-4595-777e-94ed-2d18e5478bf3} = True

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 87230567-76ff-1f86-192a-7d665c02f44cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb09a2636g54b8g4baag8a5bg4d7b7bb3534aText UUID: 412c03cd-2d0d-49f6-8d38-cce792eba8a4Show Once: True
              • •
                580.LoveDryad: I await with a heart full and happy - eager to begin. [End]

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f7435ab1-7890-ccfc-c861-fc5cd4e44882Speaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h66dd80b3gdd7bg450egad93g09b0a9f7661dText UUID: 128fae9f-3ed4-44eb-82d8-2586b9bc9bbfTimeline Phase Index: 221Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f7435ab1-7890-ccfc-c861-fc5cd4e44882Timeline Phase Duration: 5.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
            • +
              576.Player: Like I need a dryad to tell me what I feel.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f4aab80e-697a-075d-6ff7-0ca77b535b63Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h95f6e23bgfe67g441eg8d94g4e71429fb3fdText UUID: b9e713ae-a8a6-4ef5-bb09-27ff8cc3431aShow Once: True
              • •
                390.LoveDryad: Your words are cruel, but your heart quivers. Love is a tangled forest - there is no shame in seeking guidance. Think on it. [End]

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ad98b89a-5a38-3bfd-0158-f1e6d913191fSpeaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h5c4cfc0ag93e9g45d5gaaccged7da8fb9fd7Text UUID: f8dfcde0-86ca-478a-a1f8-e04190fbecaeTimeline Phase Index: 231Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ad98b89a-5a38-3bfd-0158-f1e6d913191fTimeline Phase Duration: 15.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
            • •
              52.Player: Leave.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 123eac57-bf46-d547-e405-7ebff5f3ace3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h74cdd0a6g070fg412ega688g19a5965d4535Text UUID: b7db9b08-d84d-4d85-a8b2-99a2aa928923Show Once: TrueUnmapped Attributes: endnode
      • +
        177.Player: I have no time for love.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4f2ab57e-82d3-c9a4-d6cc-3259e9c4491dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h48e4f284g41eeg4656ga405gdfc207bf995aText UUID: acaadea8-703a-4c05-91f9-08656f34b955Show Once: True
        • +
          361.LoveDryad: Love blossoms in life's furies - you have formed bonds in this time, have you not? Trust. Respect. These are clothes that love dresses in.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a54c090c-b396-d046-7265-a87bf20ba1a8Speaker: 0 (LoveDryad)Text Handle: h3b87b71cgfff3g4d0dg8b83g415637deb604Text UUID: 6114b170-1f5c-4b8b-b222-fef2115632a8Timeline Phase Index: 58Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a54c090c-b396-d046-7265-a87bf20ba1a8Timeline Phase Duration: 18.28sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
          • •

      • +
        563.Player: I care only for myself.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: eeff85c9-d510-9f3a-e60b-1e9ea9a3bb7fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hcaf3df59g0c7cg4c05g8cabgfd362afb4bddText UUID: d8bec2f2-4fd0-4fa3-88f4-d557e639bc46Show Once: True
        • +
          159.LoveDryad: Everyone loves - even those who wrap their hearts in stone. I can help you see that love more clearly.

          Metadata

    • See Node 391 (LoveDryad) Your eyes, stira. There is pain, endless and deep. But also devotion - blazing like the sun. You're in love, are you not?
